name: feature.crm.nodes
description: CRM feature node pack — contact-triage nodes shipped by the CRM feature package (ADR 0001 §4 reference feature). The two variants (basic / enriched) back the CRM toggle's A/B bindings.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: CRM Triage (basic)
nodes.description: Rule-based contact triage — scores a contact from its stage. The `basic` variant binding.

nodes.label: CRM Triage (enriched)
nodes.description: Enriched contact triage — adds company-signal weighting. The `enriched` variant binding.
